If the image has exactly 3 channels, it proceeds to add 'n' salt noise points at random (x, y) coordinates within the image dimensions. The salt points are set to maximum brightness (255). Finally, the modified image is saved to a new file. The operations are standard image processing routines with no signs of malicious activity, backdoors, or suspicious behavior.",
